narrative:
Ames Township (precinct in Athens County) has 740 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.8 percentage points.
